name: Lark (Larksuite)
description: An enterprise collaboration platform (chat, docs, calendar) with an Open Platform for building apps and integrations.

auth_methods.note: Authentication docs page (Authentication) for the Open Platform documents OAuth flows, App Access Token and Tenant Access Token methods (token-based). The fetched page is the official Authentication doc root confirming these methods are documented.

credential_access.note: Getting Started / Manage App doc indicates how to create an app and obtain App ID and App Secret from the developer console (self-serve). The developer console root is accessible at https://open.larksuite.com/ for account sign-up.

api_surface.note: The Open Platform documentation root provides navigation to API reference and SDKs; Lark/Feishu exposes a broad REST API surface covering many product objects. The docs root confirms the API reference exists.

buildability.note: Public developer docs and self-serve app creation are available; standard credentials (App ID/Secret) and token flows are documented enabling development today.

queries: Lark Open Platform authentication App Access Token Tenant Access Token OAuth
Lark Feishu manage app obtain App ID App Secret create app
Lark Open Platform API reference REST SDKs
Lark app review permissions require enterprise partner review
